top_signals.title: Oil rises to highest level in six weeks as Middle East war escalates
top_signals.summary: Goldman Sachs warns Brent crude price could jump to $120 if Strait of Hormuz remains ‘disrupted’
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil prices jump 4% as Rubio says Iran 'not serious' about peace talks
top_signals.summary: Oil prices rose as hopes for a ceasefire in the Middle East faded.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin rally faces key test at $68,000 as 'summer slumber' grips crypto, analysts say
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: FTSE 100 Live: Stocks rise; inflation eases in boost for Healey
top_signals.summary: Welcome back to the City AM FTSE 100 liveblog. It’s Wednesday and new Chancellor John Healey secured an early boost after the Office for National Statistics (ONS) revealed that inflation slowed in June. Headline CPI inflation dipped from 2.8 per cent in May to 2.6 per cent in June. Grant Fitzner, chief economist at the [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin ETFs extend inflow streak to six days with $203M added
top_signals.summary: US spot Bitcoin ETFs extended their inflow streak to six sessions, bringing in about $930 million while remaining down $4.84 billion on a net basis year to date.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Closing the Identity Gaps in Critical Infrastructure Security
top_signals.summary: Critical infrastructure attacks often begin with stolen credentials, compromised devices, or trusted accounts. Specops Software explains why Zero Trust should verify both user identities and device trust before granting access to critical systems. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan’s electricity price hits highest in over 3 years on triple blow
top_signals.summary: With a triple whammy of blistering heat, yen weakness and escalating fuel costs, the nationwide day-ahead spot price surged to ¥24.78 a kilowatt-hour on Wednesday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Critical SharePoint RCE flaw exploited to steal machine keys
top_signals.summary: Hackers are actively exploiting the critical CVE-2026-50522 vulnerability in Microsoft SharePoint to steal machine keys and maintain access even after affected servers are patched. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
